inputs.label: Roof Area
inputs.businessContext: Total catchment area of the roof surface available for rainwater collection.

businessContext_i18n.en: Total catchment area of the roof surface available for rainwater collection.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Yağmur suyu toplama için mevcut çatı yüzeyinin toplam toplama alanı.

inputs.label: Runoff Coefficient
inputs.businessContext: Ratio of rainfall that becomes runoff, accounting for roof material, slope, and evaporation losses.

businessContext_i18n.en: Ratio of rainfall that becomes runoff, accounting for roof material, slope, and evaporation losses.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Çatı malzemesi, eğim ve buharlaşma kayıplarını hesaba katarak yağışın akışa dönüşme oranı.

inputs.label: Average Annual Rainfall
inputs.businessContext: Long-term average precipitation depth per year at the location.

businessContext_i18n.en: Long-term average precipitation depth per year at the location.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Konumda yıllık uzun vadeli ortalama yağış derinliği.

inputs.label: Filter Efficiency
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of harvested water that passes through the filtration system without loss.

businessContext_i18n.en: Percentage of harvested water that passes through the filtration system without loss.
businessContext_i18n.tr: Filtrasyon sisteminden kayıpsız geçen toplanan suyun yüzdesi.

suggestedActions: Review inputs and verify results against site standards.
